title: TAT-2691 Phase B-post — sidepanel reopen replays perps redirect (AC2/AC3/AC6)
summary: After sidepanel-toggle.sh cycle closed and reopened the side panel, the new sidepanel JS context boots fresh on sidepanel.html. The home component's componentDidMount reads the surviving lastVisitedPerpsRoute and dispatches setRedirectAfterDefaultPage; checkRedirectAfterDefaultPage navigates to /perps/market/BTC. Asserts the post-cycle URL ends at /perps/market/BTC and PerpsLayout has re-mounted (lvpr is re-persisted with a fresh timestamp).

ac3-assert-redirect.expression: JSON.stringify({ url: location.href, hash: location.hash, lvpr: stateHooks.store.getState().metamask.lastVisitedPerpsRoute })
